figma.//teamIds: TODO(config): paste team IDs (the number in figma.com/files/team/<ID>/...). Auto-discovers every file in the team.
figma.//fileKeys: Explicit files to watch (the code in figma.com/design/<KEY>/...). Seeded with the El Alsson case-study file.
figma.//extraHandles: Extra names/aliases that count as a mention of you, in addition to your Figma handle from GET /v1/me.
figma.//includeAllUnresolved: If true, include every unresolved comment (not just ones mentioning you). Noisy — leave false.

slack.//channelLabel: Cosmetic — shown in logs. The real destination is the SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL secret.

//jobsBaseRawUrl: TODO(config): raw base URL the Figma plugin fetches the day's jobs from, e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/<owner>/<repo>/main/jobs . Repo can be public — it holds no secrets (those live in GitHub Actions secrets).
